title: zanthoxylum verrucosum
intro: Zanthoxylum verrucosum, also known as the Rough Prickly Ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds that help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum verrucosum include relief from pain and swelling, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum verrucosum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
